subcodes.title: The Pitiful Causes of War, and the Duty of Everyone to Strive for Peace: Words spoken on 1911-10-21 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I hope you are all happy and well. I am not happy, but very sad. The news of the Battle of Benghazi grieves my heart. I wonder at the human savagery that still exists in the world!
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حوادث ایطالیا و ترکیا را خواندم باز محاربه جدیدی شده خون بیچارگان انسان
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @importance of prayer, @war and peace, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
